lines.speaker: Frankie
lines.text: Welcome to Frankie's Fish Emporium, what can I do for you mate?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What have you got for sale?

lines.speaker: Frankie
lines.text: We serve the finest fresh fish Piscarilius has to offer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do around here?

lines.speaker: Frankie
lines.text: I trade the finest fish in Piscarilius. In this city you get two choices, fishing or thuggery. I've kept afloat without resorting to the latter, not something which can be said by many of the folk around here.
